text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: pfg
Date: Fri Nov  1 19:05:20 UTC 2019
New revision: 516263
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/516263

Log:
  devel/dmake: update to version 4.12.3

  An Apache developer has taken back the maintainance of Dmake so point to his
  latest revision on github. Also point back the WWW URL to the old homepage.

  PR:		223153
  Approved by:	thierry (mentor)

Changes:
  head/devel/dmake/Makefile
  head/devel/dmake/distinfo
  head/devel/dmake/pkg-descr
